Apa itu webhook?
Webhook = HTTP callback. Server A kirim POST ke URL server B ketika event terjadi. Push-based, real-time. Lawan: polling (server B tanya terus ke A).

Idempotency = same operation gives same result, regardless of how many times executed. Critical untuk API retries. POST create = tidak idempotent. PUT update = idempotent.
